title: euphrasia nemorosa subsp. willkommii
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. willkommii is a subspecies of the Euphrasia nemorosa plant, commonly known as woodland eyebright, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. willkommii include relief from eye and ear infections, as well as its use in treating colds, coughs, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and are typically used in traditional medicine.
